heading: Why trust this Orlando safety guide
intro: This guide reflects real on-the-ground knowledge of Orlando as a tourist destination — what the actual risks are, which areas are overstated, and what visitors genuinely need to know.

items.title: Theme park logistics covered
items.text: Orlando's tourist safety is mostly about park logistics — crowds, parking, and staying oriented in large resort environments. This guide addresses the real risks, not abstract crime stats.

items.title: Honest about off-site risks
items.text: Outside the resort corridors, Orlando is a regular Florida city with normal urban safety considerations. This guide tells you which specific areas to be aware of.

items.title: Car safety addressed
items.text: Florida driving culture and parking lot safety are covered — practical advice for the majority of tourists who rent a car in Orlando.

items.title: Current for 2026
items.text: Safety conditions change. This guide reflects the current state of Orlando's tourist areas, not outdated impressions from years past.

footer: If you want a straightforward, honest safety guide for visiting Orlando as a tourist, this covers everything you need to know.
